typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	ArchivePath as string (),
	destination_error_rows as integer (),
	ErrorLogPath as string (),
	ErrorLogPathFileName as string (),
	FileFound as boolean (),
	From_email as string (),
	FullArchivePathFileName as string (),
	FullSourcePathFileName as string (),
	MyFileValue as string (),
	SMTP as string (),
	SourcePath as string (),
	source_error_rows as integer (),
	To_email as string ()
}

source(output(
		{} as date 'dd-MM-yyyy'
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false) ~> ExcelSource
ExcelSource sink(input(
		Effective_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		AsOfDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Type as string,
		Amount as double,
		Loan_Account_Number as string,
		Source as string,
		Reason as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		Effective_Date,
		AsOfDate,
		Type,
		Amount,
		Loan_Account_Number = LOAN_Account_Number,
		Source,
		Reason)) ~> OLEDBDestination
